name: browsevault
description: Private local-first browser history search, backup, export, and preservation extension.

scripts.check: node --check src/background.js && node --check src/storage.js && node --check src/query.js && node --check src/browser-memory.js && node --check src/features/backup-import/core/archive-parser.js && node --check src/features/backup-import/core/import-preview.js && node --check src/features/backup-import/ui/render-import-preview.js && node --check src/features/display-preferences/core/preferences.js && node --check src/features/history-export/core/export-format.js && node --check src/features/history-results/core/results.js && node --check src/features/history-results/ui/render-results.js && node --check src/features/history-results/ui/text-highlighting.js && node --check src/export-format.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check scripts/validate-extension.mjs
